Why Listen

Built for People Who Make
Packaging Decisions

No Fluff, No Filler

Every episode is a focused conversation with a named expert — no generic "trends" talk. You get specific frameworks, regulatory dates, and vendor-level detail you can act on the same day.

Practitioners, Not Pundits

Güneri and Stefan have spent a combined 50+ years inside Amazon, Digimarc, SGK, and the Janoschka Group. Every question comes from having actually shipped this technology.

Ahead of Regulation

DPP, ESPR, and GS1 Sunrise 2027 deadlines move fast. CoCo translates dense EU regulatory text into what it actually means for your packaging roadmap — months before your compliance team asks.

Made For
Brand & Packaging Leaders Sustainability & Compliance Teams Supply Chain & Traceability Managers Retail Innovation Teams DPP & GS1 Implementers Packaging Technology Vendors

The Hosts

Meet the Voices

Host

Güneri Tugcu

Global Director, Strategic Partnerships & Ecosystems · CNCT by r-pac

With over 26 years at the intersection of technology, brand integrity, and digital transformation, Güneri is one of Europe's foremost authorities on connected packaging and Digital Product Passports. His career spans senior roles at Amazon (Sr. Partner Manager, EU Transparency), Digimarc (Sr. European Channel Manager), SGK/Schawk (Director Digital Innovation), and S+T Reprotechnik / Matthews Brand Solutions. At CNCT by r-pac, he leads the global partner ecosystem spanning NFC, RFID, QR serialization, DPP compliance, and traceability. A keynote speaker at events including Tokio Pack, NRF NYC, London Packaging Week, and World BI, he also authors for MoreThanDigital.info and co-hosts the CoCo podcast.

Connected Packaging DPP NFC / RFID / QR Strategic Partnerships Brand Integrity Keynote Speaker
View LinkedIn Profile
Co-Host

Stefan Hilss

Managing Director · Linked2Brands / Janoschka Group

With over 30 years in the prepress and packaging industry, Stefan Hilss is one of the sector's most experienced executives. As Managing Director of Linked2Brands — a Janoschka Group spin-off with 25+ years of packaging prepress excellence — he brings unrivalled operational depth to every conversation. Stefan understands the entire packaging value chain from creation through production, having held multiple international management positions within the Janoschka network. He is a sought-after speaker on connected packaging and digital brand transformation, having appeared at TrueColors Conference, CREATE EU, and major industry forums across Europe. His practical, no-nonsense perspective on where packaging technology meets brand reality makes him the perfect counterpoint in every CoCo conversation.

Packaging Prepress Connected Packaging Brand Presentation Digital Transformation Value Chain Industry Speaker
View LinkedIn Profile
About CoCo

Your Blueprint for a
Connected Tomorrow

CoCo: Click. Consume. Connect. is where the leaders shaping the future of connected products and connected consumers come together.

Hosted by Güneri Tugcu and Stefan Hilss, the podcast features candid conversations with executives, founders, innovators, and industry pioneers from some of the world's leading brands, technology companies, standards organizations, and industry associations.

Together, they explore the forces transforming commerce — from traceability and sustainability to digital product passports, consumer engagement, retail innovation, brand integrity, circularity, and emerging technologies.

CoCo connects strategy with execution, bringing listeners practical insights, real-world experiences, and forward-looking perspectives from those driving change across the global product ecosystem.

"If you're looking to understand where consumer engagement, product intelligence, and digital transformation are headed next — you're in the right place."
01

The physical product is only half the product — the other half is the data. Connected packaging transforms the object into an experience and a data asset.

02

DPP is not compliance paperwork. It is a strategic enabler for brand storytelling, consumer engagement, sustainability reporting, and supply chain intelligence.

03

Connected packaging has moved from marketing gimmick to infrastructure. What was a novelty in 2018 is now a regulatory requirement for 2030.

04

The biggest blockers are not technology — they are knowledge gaps, budget misalignment, and internal silos. CoCo closes the knowledge gap.

05

From farm to fork, from farm to closet — end-to-end traceability is no longer optional. Brands that act now build the competitive moat of tomorrow.
